proof: function[T0](x0: Option[T0]) { not option_is_some[T0](x0) or Option.none[T0] != x0 }[T](Option.none[T])
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0]) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_is_some[T0](x1) }[T](identity_fn(value), Option.some(identity_fn(value)))
function[T0](x0: Option[T0]) { not option_is_some[T0](x0) or x0.is_some }[T](Option.some(identity_fn(value)))
function[T0](x0: Option[T0]) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_is_none[T0](x0) }[T](Option.none[T])
function[T0](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0) { not option_is_none[T0](x0) or Option.some[T0](x1) != x0 }[T](Option.some(identity_fn(value)), identity_fn(value))
function[T0](x0: Option[T0]) { not x0.is_none or option_is_none[T0](x0) }[T](Option.some(identity_fn(value)))
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { (not x0 or x1 and (not x1 or x0)) = iff_bool(x0, x1) }(opt.is_some, not opt.is_none)
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { x0 != x1 or iff_bool(x0, x1) }(opt.is_some, not opt.is_none)
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { iff_bool(x0, x1) or x0 or x1 }(opt.is_some, not opt.is_none)
not (not opt.is_some or not opt.is_none and (opt.is_none or opt.is_some))
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { (not x0 or x1 and (not x1 or x0)) = iff_bool(x0, x1) }(opt.is_none, not opt.is_some)
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { x0 != x1 or iff_bool(x0, x1) }(opt.is_none, not opt.is_some)
function(x0: Bool, x1: Bool) { iff_bool(x0, x1) or x0 or x1 }(opt.is_none, not opt.is_some)
not (not opt.is_none or not opt.is_some and (opt.is_some or opt.is_none))
function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[T, T](opt, identity_fn[T])
function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[T, T](value, opt, identity_fn[T])
exists(k0: Option[T]) { identity_fn(k0) != option_map[T, T](k0, identity_fn[T]) }
let w0: Option[T] satisfy { function(x0: Option[T]) { option_map[T, T](x0, identity_fn[T]) }(w0) != identity_fn(w0) }
function(x0: Option[T]) { option_map[T, T](x0, identity_fn[T]) = identity_fn(x0) }(w0)
function[T0](x0: Option[T0]) { option_map[T0, T0](x0, identity_fn[T0]) = identity_fn[Option[T0]](x0) }[T](opt)

goal: option_map[A, C](opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) = Option.none[C]
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[A, C](opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g))
function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[A, B](opt, g)

goal: option_map[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f) = Option.none[C]
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Option[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { Option.none[T0] != x0 or option_map[T0, T2](x0, x1) = Option.none[T2] }[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f)

goal: compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt) = option_map[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x3: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x3, f) }, function(x4: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x4, g) }, opt)

goal: option_map[A, C](opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) = compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt)
proof: compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt) != Option.none[C]
compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x2: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x2, f) }, function(x3: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x3, g) }, opt) = Option.none[C]

goal: option_map[A, C](opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) = Option.some(compose[A, B, C](f, g)(value))
proof: function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[A, C](value, opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g))

goal: compose[A, B, C](f, g, value) = f(g(value))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B, C](f, g, value)
function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[A, B](value, opt, g)

goal: option_map[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f) = Option.some(f(g(value)))
proof: function[T0, T3](x0: T0, x1: Option[T0], x2: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[T0](x0) != x1 or option_map[T0, T3](x1, x2) = Option.some[T3](x2(x0)) }[B, C](g(value), option_map[A, B](opt, g), f)

goal: compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt) = option_map[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x3: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x3, f) }, function(x4: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x4, g) }, opt)

goal: option_map[A, C](opt, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) = compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt)

proof: exists(k0: Option[A]) { option_map[A, C](k0, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) != compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, k0) }

let w0: Option[A] satisfy { option_map[A, C](w0, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) != compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x2: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x2, f) }, function(x3: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x3, g) }, w0) }

function(x0: Option[A]) { compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x1: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x1, f) }, function(x2: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x2, g) }, x0) = option_map[A, C](x0, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) }(w0)

goal: compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x0: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x0, f) }, function(x1: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x1, g) }, opt) = option_map[B, C](option_map[A, B](opt, g), f)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x3: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x3, f) }, function(x4: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x4, g) }, opt)

function(x0: Option[A]) { compose[Option[A], Option[B], Option[C]](function(x1: Option[B]) { option_map[B, C](x1, f) }, function(x2: Option[A]) { option_map[A, B](x2, g) }, x0) = option_map[A, C](x0, compose[A, B, C](f, g)) }(opt)
